/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/bzzz_msgs/msg/_motor_commands_s.c.o CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/bzzz_msgs/msg/_sensor_suite_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mbell/bzzz_ws/build/bzzz_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
